DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF GOLDEN LINK CONCESSIONAIRES LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SET NO 1. THE PARTIES DO NOT STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. DISCUSSED AND THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 28, 2016 AT 9:30 AM TO BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE KAHN. COUNSEL WILL MEET AND CONFER ON A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER TO BE SUBMITTED TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM BY APRIL 21, 2016. IF THE PARTIES ARE IN AGREEMENT THAT THE JUDGE PRO TEM MAY SIGN THE STIPULATED ORDER, THE HEARING ON APRIL 28, 2016 MAY BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE PRO TEM: VEDICA PURI, CLERK: E. Plaintiff Golden Link Concessionaires Llc'S Motion To Compel Compliance With Requests For Production Of Documents Set No 1
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Plaintiff Golden Link Concessionaires LLC'S Motion To Compel Compliance With Requests For Production Of Documents Set Number 1 is off calendar. The parties stipulated to a form of order that the Judge Pro Tem will execute that renders the motion moot.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Requests For Production Of Documents Set No 1
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person in Dept. 302.

In Re: PLAINTIFF GOLDEN LINK CONCESSIONAIRES LLC'S Motion To Compel Compliance With Requests For Production Of Documents Set No 1 - There will be a further hearing before the judge pro tem on April 7, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. on this motion and, if appropriate, a hearing will be scheduled before the Department 302 Judge at a later date. There will not be any hearing before the Department 302 Judge on this motion on April 7, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DAVID BUONCRISTIANI, ESQ. of Jones Day, Tel No. 415-626-3939 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. ERIN E. HOLBROOK, ESQ. of the State of California, Department of Transportation, Tel No. 916-654-2630 appearing telephonically for Defendant State of California, Department of Transportation.

RULING - Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The demurrer is overruled. Appendix 1 and the amended version both define "claim" to include "a written demand... for a time extension or payment of money or damages..." None of that is present in this declaratory relief action. Accordingly, sec. 24.1.4, which controls the timing of litigation, is inapposite. The complaint sufficiently sets forth several actual/prospective controversies that support a claim for declaratory relief
under CCP 1060. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
